main.description: A Fours puzzle consisting of four groups of four words, each with a category and difficulty level.

groups.description: The four groups that make up the puzzle.

allowDaily.description: Whether the puzzle author allows this puzzle to be used in daily puzzle feeds.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when the puzzle was created.

group.description: A group of four words sharing a common category.

category.description: The category name that describes what the four words have in common.

words.description: The four words belonging to this group.

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of the group. 0 = easiest, 3 = hardest.
